column1: #    sample_name   : unique identifier (used for all output filenames)
#    cell_type     : biological condition / cell line (used for grouping)
#    srr           : SRR accession (leave blank if providing local files)
#    fastq_r1      : path to local R1 FASTQ (leave blank if using SRR)
#    fastq_r2      : path to local R2 FASTQ (paired-end only; blank otherwise)
# sample_name : unique ID used for all output filenames. No spaces.
# cell_type   : biological condition or cell line. Samples sharing a cell_type
#               are treated as replicates of the same condition.
#               Each cell_type must have at least rep1 and rep2 for both
# srr         : SRA accession number (e.g. SRR3306577). The pipeline will
#               Leave blank if providing local FASTQ files.
# fastq_r1    : Path to local R1 FASTQ (leave blank if using srr)
# fastq_r2    : Path to local R2 FASTQ (paired-end only; leave blank otherwise)
# ─── DELETE THESE COMMENT LINES AND ADD YOUR SAMPLES BELOW ───────────────────
